caption: The video captures a medical education session, likely part of a surgical bootcamp for MD candidates at the University of Maryland School of Medicine. The scene shows a group of students dressed in blue scrubs seated in a classroom setting, attentively listening to a lecture or presentation. The instructor, also in scrubs, is positioned at the front of the room, engaging with the students. On the left side of the screen, there is a list of names and years, indicating the involvement of various faculty members and administrative support staff. The text acknowledges the contributions of instructors like Cheralyn Hendrix, MD, and thanks the Class of 2023 for participating in the filming. A QR code is visible on the right, possibly linking to additional resources or information related to the course. The overall atmosphere suggests a structured and professional learning environment focused on preparing future medical professionals.
